self
****


Description
===========

Use the SELF Service CLI to manage Subscriptions in Oracle Cloud
Infrastructure Marketplace. For more information, see Overview of
Marketplace


Available Commands
==================

* partner-integeration

  * listing-subs-collection

    * listing-subscriptions

  * partner-subscription

    * activate-subscription

    * resolve-subscription

* subscription

  * subscription

    * change-compartment

    * create

    * delete

    * get

    * update

  * subscription-collection

    * list-subscriptions

  * subscription-token

    * get

  * work-request

    * cancel

    * get

    * list

  * work-request-error

    * list

  * work-request-log-entry

    * list-work-request-logs
